name: Ten Minutes by Tractor

awards: Good Food Guide Restaurant of the Year 2023

signature: Estate-grown pinot noir alongside a seasonal degustation rooted in the Ridge vineyard
editorNote:
Three hats and the most considered wine program on the Peninsula  -  Ten Minutes by Tractor earns every accolade with a degustation that feels genuinely rooted in place. The Ridge vineyard slopes outside the window aren't decoration; they're the story. Book the long lunch: you'll want the afternoon.

The cooking is technically precise without being cold. The team understands restraint  -  flavours are clear and confident, not overwrought. The charred bread with cultured butter has become a quiet institution.

Book at least six weeks ahead for weekends. Lunch is the move.

visiting.tastingNote: Reservations recommended; walk-ins accepted subject to availability. Estate & 10X flight $15 (waived on purchase); Single Vineyard flight $50; Terroir Masterclass $80.

restaurant.name: Ten Minutes by Tractor Restaurant
restaurant.description: Fine dining, 2 Hats Age Good Food Guide 2023–2025. Seasonally driven menu using local produce. A destination in its own right.

editorVerdict: Ten Minutes by Tractor is where Mornington Peninsula wine stops apologising for its ambitions. Three original family vineyards, each named and separately vinified, plus a winemaking philosophy pulled straight from Burgundy's manual: high-density planting, spontaneous fermentation, gravity flow. The two-hat restaurant cements it as a full-day destination for anyone who takes wine seriously.

faq.q: Does Ten Minutes by Tractor take walk-ins or do you need to book?
faq.a: The cellar door is open daily 11am–5pm. Reservations are recommended; walk-ins are accepted subject to availability. The restaurant requires a separate booking.

faq.q: Does Ten Minutes by Tractor have a restaurant?
faq.a: Yes — a two-hat Modern Australian fine-dining restaurant, awarded consistently 2023–2025 by The Age Good Food Guide.

faq.q: Are dogs allowed at Ten Minutes by Tractor?
faq.a: Dogs are permitted on the estate grounds but are not allowed inside the cellar door, restaurant buildings, or dining terrace.

heroImage.alt: Vineyard rows evocative of Ten Minutes by Tractor's Ridge vineyard, the source for their three-hat degustation, Red Hill, Mornington Peninsula
